heading: Repealed. , , eff.June 25, 1948, ch. 646, § 3962 Stat. 992Sept. 1, 1948
label: 1647 Repealed. , , eff.June 25, 1948, ch. 646, § 3962 Stat. 992Sept. 1, 1948
notes: Section, , , which repealed that part of section 195 of , that read as follows: was repealed by act , which repealed section 195 of .act June 17, 1930, ch. 497, title IV, § 64746 Stat. 762act Mar. 3, 1911, ch. 231act Mar. 3, 1911, ch. 231“in any case in which there is drawn in question the construction of the Constitution of the United States, or any part thereof, or of any treaty made pursuant thereto, or in any other case when the Attorney General of the United States shall, before the decision of the Court of Customs Appeals is rendered, file with the court a certificate to the effect that the case is of such importance as to render expedient its review by the Supreme Court,”June 25, 1948
